rationale:

No changes to `website/assets/css/custom.css` are visible — cannot verify token replacement, HSL re-derivation, Google Fonts @import, or new CSS variable exposure.
Re-run the review against the merged result_rev `686a589a` (or the diff `9af6b048..686a589a`) to evaluate ACs against actual CSS changes.
